_comment: Claude Code MCP config for the Gaffer factory: the two data-plane MCP servers the agent delivers through. tick.sh renders a runtime copy, substituting ${DISPATCH_DB}/${MEMORY_DB} (runtime DB copies), ${DISPATCH_MCP_BIN}/${MEMORY_MCP_BIN} (the built dist bins), and ${GAFFER_CLAIM_TOKEN} (RUNNER-OWNED-BOOKKEEPING: the runner-held delivery claim token, so the agent's token-gated evidence writes resolve it from the server env — the agent never handles the token). Build the workspace first: pnpm -r build.
